# Acme Corp Q3 2024 Research Brief

## Topline

Acme Corp reported Q3 2024 revenue of $12.4 billion, an 18% year-over-year increase. Net income reached $2.8 billion, up 22% YoY. Operating margin expanded to 24.5% from 21.3% a year earlier.

## AI Segment

The AI segment was the primary growth driver this quarter. AI segment revenue grew to $3.1 billion, doubling year-over-year, and now represents 25% of total revenue. The segment's gross margin reached 65%, well above the corporate average of 52%.

## Risks

Customer concentration in the top 5 enterprise accounts remains elevated at 38% of total revenue. Competitive pressure on inference pricing could compress AI segment margins next year.

## Outlook

Management guided Q4 2024 revenue of $13.0 to $13.5 billion, implying continued mid-teens YoY growth. The AI segment is expected to surpass 30% of revenue mix by year-end.
